source_pr.title: *: upgrade grpc to 1.23.0
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? test upgrade grpc from 1.17.0 to 1.23.0 in master see more detail https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/releases ### What is changed and how it works? go.mod ### Check List Tests - No code Code changes - go.mod Side effects - n/a Related changes - n/a --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/12055)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to instability introduced during test-infrastructure migration or refactoring (framework changes, fixtures/setup/teardown, or helper updates). Test-framework migrations can introduce subtle setup/teardown or helper mismatches that surface as flakiness. This PR stabilizes it by: *: upgrade grpc to 1.23.0.

evidence: files: ddl/ddl.go, go.mod, go.sum, owner/fail_test.go, store/tikv/test_util.go, tools/check/go.mod
